tabs.content:
-- View a sample of 100 records in the table.
select top 100 * from fact_attendance



fact_attendance
| where is_present == false
| summarize AbsentCourses = make_set(course_key)
          by student_key, date_key




fact_attendance
| where is_present == false
| join kind=leftouter external_table('dim_student') on student_key
| join kind=leftouter external_table('dim_course') on course_key
| join kind=leftouter external_table('dim_date') on date_key
| summarize AbsentCourses = make_set(course_name),
            StudentName = any(strcat(firt_name," ",last_name)),
            AbsentDate = any(full_date)
          by student_key, date_key

fact_attendance
| where student_key == 189 and date_key == 20260325
| take 10

-- View a sample of 100 records in the table.
select top 100 * from fact_attendance


select top 100 * from fact_attendance where is_present = 0

select top 100 * from fact_attendance

.drop materialized-view attendance_agent_mv



.create materialized-view attendance_agent_mv
on table fact_attendance
{
    fact_attendance
    | where is_present == false
    | summarize
        AbsentCourses = make_set(course_key),
        EventCount = dcount(course_key)
      by student_key, date_key
}





attendance_agent_mv
